div.p: Every return from waitpid(-1, &status, 0) traverses this tree. Leaf nodes show exact ptrace(PTRACE_SYSCALL, pid, 0, SIG) call.
Decode status word sig = WSTOPSIG(status) ← bits [15:8] event = (status >> 16) & 0xff ← bits [23:16]
Not expected under ptrace. Loop back to waitpid(-1).

p.strong: DO NOT flip in_syscall toggle — not a syscall stop.

div.p: Enabled by PTRACE_O_TRACESYSGOOD: Bit 7 set on SIGTRAP for syscall stops. Distinguishes from genuine SIGTRAP.
Two cases: (a) Synthetic — initial stop of new child. (b) Genuine — kill(pid, SIGSTOP).
Real signal intercepted before delivery. Intercepts SIGTERM, SIGINT, SIGUSR1, etc. Passing 0 would suppress the signal. DO NOT flip in_syscall toggle.
